insightsStatSub7Days.desc: Subtitle under each summary stat chip indicating the metric covers the last 7 days.

insightsStatAvgSleep.desc: Label for the summary stat chip showing average hours of sleep over 7 days.

insightsStatActiveDays.desc: Label for the summary stat chip showing the number of days with logged activity.

insightsStatJournalDays.desc: Label for the summary stat chip showing the number of days with a journal entry.

insightsChartMood.desc: Title of the mood trend chart card, covering the last 7 days.

insightsChartCravings.desc: Title of the cravings trend chart card, covering the last 7 days.

insightsChartSleep.desc: Title of the sleep chart card; values shown are hours per day over 7 days.

insightsChartExercise.desc: Title of the exercise chart card; values shown are minutes per day over 7 days.

insightsEmptyMood.desc: Empty-state message shown in the mood chart when no journal entries exist.

insightsEmptyCravings.desc: Empty-state message shown in the cravings chart when no cravings are logged.

insightsEmptySleep.desc: Empty-state message shown in the sleep chart when no sleep is logged.

insightsEmptyActivity.desc: Empty-state message shown in the exercise chart when no activity is logged.

insightsMoodHard.desc: Mood-chart legend label for a hard/low mood day (short form, distinct from 'Hard day').

insightsThoughtPatterns.desc: Title of the thought-patterns card showing positive/neutral/challenging thought breakdown over 7 days.

insightsEmptyThoughts.desc: Empty-state message in the thought-patterns card when no thoughts are logged.

insightsThoughtChallenging.desc: Label for the challenging (negative) category row in the thought-patterns card.

insightsWeekdayMon.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Monday, shown on chart x-axes.

insightsWeekdayTue.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Tuesday, shown on chart x-axes.

insightsWeekdayWed.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Wednesday, shown on chart x-axes.

insightsWeekdayThu.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Thursday, shown on chart x-axes.

insightsWeekdayFri.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Friday, shown on chart x-axes.

insightsWeekdaySat.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Saturday, shown on chart x-axes.

insightsWeekdaySun.desc: Single-letter abbreviation for Sunday, shown on chart x-axes.
